task: AI Gateway deep-dive research - Vercel, Bifrost, Portkey self-host
result: Completed follow-up research on 3 questions: (1) Vercel AI Gateway is NOT included in Pro - separate $5/mo credit system, (2) Bifrost ecosystem concern is valid but not disqualifying - main gap is prompt management, (3) Portkey self-host possible but loses analytics/cost tracking dashboard.
